backend/main.mo: Main actor defining ResearchPaper type and managing papers, edit histories, and access logs per principal, with methods to save/retrieve papers and an embedded OpenAI API key for AI generation.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms OldActor (with Gemini/Google API fields) to NewActor (without those fields), preserving papers, edit histories, access logs, and counters.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the update to ResearchTopicForm.tsx loading messages to reflect the new 4000-5000 word target length.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing components, pages, hooks, and utilities for the RDXper research paper application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space, defining colors for UI elements, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and script tag loading main.tsx for the RDXper application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for Landing (/), Dashboard (/dashboard), and GeneratedPaper (/paper), all wrapped in Layout component.
frontend/src/components/AuthButton.tsx: Authentication button displaying sign-in/sign-out controls with loading states and truncated principal display for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/DownloadButton.t: Button component that triggers PDF download of research papers by opening the browser print dialog with formatted content.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with sticky header containing logo/navigation button, Navigation component, AuthButton, and footer with attribution link.
frontend/src/components/LoadingStates.ts: Reusable skeleton loading components (FormSkeleton and PaperSkeleton) for displaying placeholder UI during data fetching.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Navigation component with Dashboard and My Paper buttons, highlighting the active route based on current path.
frontend/src/components/PaperList.tsx: Component displaying saved paper status with a view button if paper exists, or an empty state message if no papers are saved.
frontend/src/components/PaperMetadata.ts: Component displaying paper title and formatted/truncated author principal in a centered layout.
frontend/src/components/PaperView.tsx: Displays a complete research paper with formatted sections including title, abstract, keywords, introduction, methodology, results, and other academic sections. Uses Card components and includes a download button in the header.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Authentication wrapper component that redirects unauthenticated users to home page and shows a loading spinner during initialization. Uses Internet Identity hook to check authentication state.
frontend/src/components/ResearchTopicFor: Form component for creating research papers with fields for topic, title, keywords, and objectives. Submits data to backend via useCreatePaper mutation and navigates to paper view on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication. Automatically invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes due to identity updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality. Creates AuthClient with configurable options and manages identity state throughout the application lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating research paper data including usePaperData, useCheckPaperSaved, useSavePaper, and useCreatePaper. All hooks depend on the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom academic-themed color palette using CSS variables for light and dark modes. Defines scholarly blues, warm gold accents, and typography enhancements for academic content.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Protected dashboard page displaying a research topic form for generating new papers and a list of saved papers. Wrapped in ProtectedRoute to require authentication.
frontend/src/pages/GeneratedPaper.tsx: React page component that displays a generated research paper using ProtectedRoute authentication, fetches paper data via usePaperData hook, and shows loading states, error alerts, or empty state when no paper exists.
frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx: Landing page component with hero section, features grid showcasing RDXper's capabilities (16-section format, APA citations, export, security), and CTA section; redirects authenticated users to dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/downloadHelper.ts: Utility module providing functions to format ResearchPaper objects into plain text with structured sections, download as .txt files, and trigger browser print dialog for PDF generation via printable HTML.
frontend/src/utils/pdfFormatter.ts: Generates print-ready HTML for research papers with academic styling (Times New Roman, A4 page size, proper margins) including all 12 sections, abstract, keywords, and references formatted for PDF printing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extending colors using OKLCH color space, typography settings with Inter and Merriweather fonts, academic shadow styles, accordion animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state document for RDXper web app tracking architectural notes (OpenAI GPT-4 integration, Internet Identity auth, PDF generation), existing features (authentication, paper generation, download), and requirements with version 23.
